headline: Interest Rates Are Heading Down — These 3 Stocks Win Big When They Do
summary: It’s certainly one of the more interesting times to be an investor right now. After a pandemic-led recession, the economy has roared back (thanks in part to rock-bottom interest rates following that calamity). However, following a surge in inflation in 2022, Federal Reserve interest rate hikes have thrown a monkey wrench into the investing calculus ... Interest Rates Are Heading Down — These 3 Stocks Win Big When They Do

headline: D.R. Horton Expands Texas And Florida Footprint As Valuation Premium Persists
summary: D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) acquired 92 developed lots in the Indian Springs master planned community in Texas. The company is launching Driftwood Bay, a new home community in Southwest Florida featuring modern designs and energy efficient technologies. Both projects focus on affordable, family oriented housing in markets where demand for new homes remains strong. D.R. Horton is one of the largest homebuilders in the United States, with a focus on single family homes aimed at entry level and...
